title: Zered #2218
definition:
Zered = "osier brook"

 1) a river east of the Jordan, in the region of Moab and Edom, a
    source of the Arnon river
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zered = "osier brook"

 1) a river east of the Jordan, in the region of Moab and Edom, a
    source of the Arnon river

    NASB:  a wadi E. of the Dead Sea
